name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Scheduled Task Write to System32 Tasks
notes:
This Building Block detects the creation of tasks from processes executed from suspicious locations.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth
SIGMA Title: Suspicious Scheduled Task Write to System32 Tasks
SIGMA Description: Detects the creation of tasks from processes executed from suspicious locations


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Scheduled Task Write to System32 Tasks on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.File Created, System.Successful File Modification
when the event matches File Directory (custom) is any of \Windows\System32\Tasks

when the event matches (LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE'%\appdata\%' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE'%c:\perflogs%' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE'%\windows\system32\config\systemprofile%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Scheduled Task Write to System32 Tasks on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.File Created, System.Successful File Modification
AND when the event matches File Directory (custom) is any of \Windows\System32\Tasks

AND when the event matches (LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE'%\appdata\%' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE'%c:\perflogs%' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE'%\windows\system32\config\systemprofile%') AQL filter query
